description_long: This is a rectangular, vintage-style pack of Lucky Strike cigarettes, featuring a predominantly white exterior with a bold red and black circular logo on the front. The front face displays the brand name 'LUCKY STRIKE' in large red and black letters, with the slogan 'IT'S TOASTED' beneath, all encircled by tan and black rings. The top of the pack has a blue label with the text '20 Class A Coffin Nails.' The sides of the pack contain fine print and a seal, indicating authenticity and manufacturer information. The surface of the pack appears slightly worn and scuffed, suggesting age or frequent handling. The overall appearance is that of a classic, hard cardboard cigarette box.
description: A vintage-style Lucky Strike cigarette box with a bold red and black logo, white background, and visible wear marks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Lucky Strike logo, slogan, and the word 'CIGARETTES' at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying fine print, a red stripe, and a manufacturer's seal near the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the top blue label and visible wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with fine print and a red stripe, mirroring the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: The front face displays the 'LUCKY STRIKE' brand logo in a red and black circle with the slogan 'IT'S TOASTED'.
